serviceNotes.engine oil: M113 5.0L V8: 15,000 km or 12 months typical EU plan; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: V8 intake service per inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: V8: 50,000 km / 48 months (no auto-abc interval table for W211 E 500 5.0 — v7669-2002/service empty).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (5-year time cap with long-life coolant).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Port-injection V8; carbon unlikely unless symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W211 fixed petrol Tier 2 proxy; same chassis service class as M113 5.0L)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W211 maintenance plan; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months: No Tier 1/2 trim-specific air filter row on auto-abc for W211 E 500 5.0 (https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7669-2002/service has no maintenance table). Value retained from W211 V8 inspection schedule.
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W211
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 50,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-Benz W211 M113 V8 service manual maintenance table (https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7669-2002/service has no Tier 2 interval list for this trim)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W211 M113 V8 service manual maintenance table (engine coolant); auto-abc has no dedicated coolant row for this trim
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~100,000 km — specialist preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Port-injection V8 — carbon cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
